zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Luxembourg於1247年出生在比利時納姆爾時，她的父親Henri de Luxembourg V31歲，母親Marguerite de Bar27歲。她和Guy de Dampierre至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1298年9月25日在法國皮卡迪奧易可皮艾享年51歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Luxembourg于1247年出生在比利时納姆爾时，她的父亲Henri de Luxembourg V31岁，母亲Marguerite de Bar27岁。她和Guy de Dampierre至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1298年9月25日在法国皮卡迪奧易可皮艾享年51岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Luxembourg was born in 1247, in Namur, Belgium, her father, Henri de Luxembourg V, was 31 and her mother, Marguerite de Bar, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Guy de Dampierre. She died on 25 September 1298, in Compiègne, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Luxembourg est née en 1247, à Namur, Belgique, son père, Henri de Luxembourg V, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bar, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Guy de Dampierre. Elle est décédée le 25 septembre 1298, à Compiègne, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Luxembourg 1247 in Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri de Luxembourg V 31 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Bar 27. Sie hatte mit Guy de Dampierre mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. September 1298 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Compiègne, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Luxembourg è nata il nel 1247 nel Namur, Belgio, sua padre, Henri de Luxembourg V, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Bar, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Guy de Dampierre. Morì il 25 settembre 1298, nel Compiègne, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Luxembourgが1247年にベルギーナムルで生まれた時，父Henri de Luxembourg Vは31歳，母Marguerite de Barは27歳であった。彼女はGuy de Dampierreとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1298年9月25日にフランスピカーディオイゼコンパeグンで51歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Luxembourg(이)가 1247년 벨기에 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri de Luxembourg V(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Bar(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Guy de Dampierre(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 9월 25일 프랑스 피카디 이스 콤피e그니에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Luxembourg nasceu em 1247, em Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Henri de Luxembourg V, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bar, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Guy de Dampierre. Ela faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1298, em Compiègne, Oise, Picardie, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Luxembourg родилась в 1247 г. в местности намур, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Henri de Luxembourg V было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bar, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Guy de Dampierre. Она умерла 25 сентября 1298 г. в местности компиeгн, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Luxembourg nació en 1247, en Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Henri de Luxembourg V, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bar, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Guy de Dampierre. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1298, en Compiègne, Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
